questions.q: On April 28, 2026, the Canadian government tabled its Spring Economic Update, which included the announcement of the 'Canada Strong Fund'. What type of fund is this?

Reported around April 28, 2026, which Canadian telecommunications company announced it was offering voluntary buyout packages to 50 percent of its workforce?
In an interview making headlines on April 28, 2026, Prime Minister Mark Carney described the current state of which official residence as 'an embarrassment'?
According to late April 2026 news, Ontario Premier Doug Ford was found to be regularly working from home in January despite mandating what group to return to the office full-time?
